positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical illustration of celestial flora and fauna, combining stylized moons, nebula formations, and geometric exotic flowers. The composition must be centered and suitable for a single, large-scale apparel print. Use clean, strong linework and solid silhouettes. The color palette should be deep cosmic indigo, sapphire blue, rich teal, matte black, and punctuated by glowing accents of brilliant gold leaf and pale yellow. Style: Vector illustration, Neo-Art Deco meets Botanical Line Art. Highly stylized, graphic design quality, maximal contrast, perfect for screen printing or digital textile printing, flat design elements.
